# KK & Sons Equip

> India's trusted construction equipment rental partner. Excavators, cranes, loaders, rollers, generators, and forklifts available with pan-India delivery and certified operator support.

KK & Sons Equip rents heavy construction machinery to contractors and infrastructure projects across India. Pricing is daily, weekly, or monthly; every machine is insured, safety-inspected, and available with a certified operator.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview, fleet categories, and core service promises.
- [Fleet](/equipment): Browse all equipment with live availability and rates.
- [Request a Quote](/quote): Interactive estimator — pick machines, set duration, get a confirmed quote in two hours.
- [About](/about): Company history, service standards, and operations footprint.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, WhatsApp, service areas, and inquiry form.

## Guides

- [Crane Rental Pricing in India (2024)](/guides/crane-rental-pricing): Tonnage tiers, duration discounts, operator costs, and city-by-city rate ranges for Mumbai, Pune, and Delhi NCR.

## Featured Equipment

- [CAT 320 GC Excavator](/equipment/exc-001): 20-ton class general-purpose excavator.
- [Komatsu PC210 LC](/equipment/exc-002): Mid-size excavator for infrastructure work.
